name: Master Mix Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Add sugar to the master mix.
3. Combine milk and egg whites in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the milk and egg white mixture into the master mix, stirring until just combined and the flour is moistened.
5. Fill prepared muffin tins about two-thirds full with the batter.
6. Bake for 20 minutes.
YIELD: 12 Muffins
1 muffin contains approximately 58 Calories; 4 Grams Protein; 5.9 Grams Fat; 22 Grams Carbohydrates; 0.8 Grams Saturated Fat; 1.4 Grams Monounsaturated Fat; 3.4 Grams Polyunsaturated Fat; 1 Gram of Cholesterol; and 321 Milligrams Sodium.
